releases.description: Minor fixes of code and README updates

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: # Add recipe search template setting ## Overview Configure a search query to quickly find notes containing calculators. Search is triggered by a search button from recipe in Segerlab. ## Plugin setting When the search button in recipe is clicked, segerlab opens a custom Obsidian URI, that calls a comand in plugin to open search through all notes. Search query is build from a template, that can be configured in plugin settings. Inside the URI, Segerlab sends ID and name of a recipe. These parameters can be used in query template. For example: You press a serach button from recipe with name "My best recipe", so template `"{{recipeName}}"` in settings will be `"My best recipe"` in search. ## Search button in Segerlab This button will open your vault:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: # Adjust styles to support responsive calculators ## Overview Previously it was hard to use calculators with layout plugins, such as `Columns` ot `Callout manager`. This release brings support of responsive view depending on container, where a calculator was placed. ## Example Here is an example with `Columns` plugin. ### Markdown skeleton ``````markdown `````col ````col-md flexGrow=0.5 === First Column First Column First Column First Column First Column ```` ````col-md flexGrow=1 === ```segerlab-calculator { ... } ``` ```` ````col-md flexGrow=1 === ```segerlab-calculator { ... } ``` ```` ````` `````` ### Example screenshot

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: # Stull chart ## Overview Add Stull charts for better understanding of your recipes. ## Features -**Segerlab view**: There is a new panel with Stull chart, that shows all points by found calculators in opened editor. Supports auto update of points, when calculators were added, edited or removed. -**Mini-version**: Minimized version of the Stull chart also rendered in each calculator with its point. -**Themed styles**: Now all colors are taken from applied theme in Obsidian. -**Some UX adjustments**: Add some small UX adjustments, welcome message and views, that could help with some misleading behaviour (e.g. empty chart, when there are no points in a note) -**Segerlab button**: Opens your recipe, from which the calculator was copied. ### Example of view

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Initial release of Segerlab Plugin

## Overview
First release of the Segerlab plugin for Obsidian, bringing ceramic calculation views directly into your notes.

## Features
- **Calculator Rendering**: Transforms markdown code blocks with language `segerlab-calculation` into calculator views
- **ShowMoreCoefficients**: Optional setting to display additional coefficients in the calculator interface
- **Multi-language Support**: Interface available in English and Russian. Depeneds on selected language in Obsidian

## Settings
- `showMoreCoefficients`: Toggle to show extended coefficient set in calculator views
